title: Limited Vlcc Support From China Import Quotas Support For Td25
section_path: Limited Vlcc Support From China Import Quotas Support For Td25
section_path_text: Limited Vlcc Support From China Import Quotas Support For Td25
summary:
In our first issue of 2024, in the East we discuss the outlook for China-bound VLCCs in light of recent import quota announcements, and we investigate which product is most affected by Red Sea Northbound diversions. In the West, we examine the ongoing TD25 rally, and we monitor gas carriers diverting from the Red Sea. By Mary Melton

ANALYSIS / EAST OF SUEZ / DIRTY


New crude import quotas offer limited support to China-bound VLCC freight rates
VLCC freight rates on major China-bound routes
China issued crude import quotas for 2024, rather than the usual practice of around 50% of the yearly allowance at the start of the year.

children.title: New crude import quotas offer limited support to China-bound VLCC freight rates
section_path: New crude import quotas offer limited support to China-bound VLCC freight rates
children.section_path_text: New crude import quotas offer limited support to China-bound VLCC freight rates
children.summary:
VLCC freight rates on major China-bound routes
China issued crude import quotas for 2024, rather than the usual practice of around 50% of the yearly allowance at the start of the year. The change aims to boost imports, as many refiners exhausted their quotas in late 2023
However, state-run refiners, with unlimited quotas, also reduced imports in the last two months of 2023 amid softened crude demand.

children.title: High USG-to-Europe Aframax rates likely to endure in short-term
section_path: High USG-to-Europe Aframax rates likely to endure in short-term
children.section_path_text: High USG-to-Europe Aframax rates likely to endure in short-term
children.summary:
USG prompt Aframax availability
Aframax rates USG-to-Europe (TD25) shot up last week, increasing about 60% since the rally began at the New Year. This was a function of both supply and demand fundamentals.
